finding.root_cause: repoground_context_pack emits context_ref.generated_at from the current UTC clock on every successful read, so two cold reads separated by at least one second are never byte-identical

volatility_scope.lane: context pack read without a query argument
volatility_scope.covered: context_ref, freshness, bundle_status, preflight, bounded_evidence with empty snippets and ranges, access_wrappers, agent_handoff
volatility_scope.not_covered: the retrieval lane (query argument set), which delegates snippet and range ordering to the external repoground index; no cold-start determinism claim is made for it

hash_scope.exclusion_of_determinism_reason: the envelope carries the hash of the rest of the payload; including it would be circular
hash_scope.known_scope_limit: freshness.bundle.manifest_path and freshness.live_repo.repo_path are absolute paths, so content_sha256 is comparable only within one host and path layout; this limit is declared in the payload as comparability_scope and byte_equality_across_hosts_or_paths

fresh_process_observations.method: two separate Python interpreter processes per repository, started with different PYTHONHASHSEED values and separated past one whole UTC second
fresh_process_observations.reproduction_note: The probe reads live publication roots when the config binds them to the real HOME; it neutralises _require_capability, so it establishes payload determinism only, not capability authority.

nonvolatile_drift_coverage.drift: live repository HEAD advances, freshness_status moves fresh -> stale

normalisation_width_binding.claim: content_sha256 is recomputed in the test from the returned payload minus exactly the payload's own declared hash_excluded_fields, so any wider silent normalisation is detected

mutation_checks.method: temporary local edits to src/grabowski_mcp.py, reverted before commit; run against the five focused tests

results.mutant: stop excluding context_ref.generated_at from the hash input
additionally drop freshness and bounded_evidence from the hash input
declare an exclusion (snippets) that the hash input does not actually apply

test_evidence.ruff_check_changed_files: no new findings; one pre-existing E402 in tests/test_repoground_bundles.py that is also present on the base commit
test_evidence.ruff_format_changed_lines: clean for the added lines and for tests/repoground_context_pack_fresh_process_probe.py; the repository as a whole is not ruff-formatted
test_evidence.make_validate_targets: catalog-data-check, syntax, test, policy, tool-surface-budget, context-check, profiles-check, runtime-lock, deploy-tooling-check, secrets all pass
